user.title: PubliBike city and tracking mode
user.description: First select the city. Then select either a PubliBike/Velospot station or an address/coordinate as the reference point. Add the integration again for multiple locations.

station.title: Select PubliBike station
station.description: Select the station. Home Assistant creates several entities for this station and for the nearest bike/e-bike station.

data.min_ebike_battery: Minimum e-bike range for search in km

address.title: Address or coordinates as reference point
address.description: Enter an address or latitude/longitude. The integration finds the nearest station with a bike and e-bike from there. Swiss addresses are geocoded via geo.admin.ch.

data.min_ebike_battery: Minimum e-bike range for search in km

error.no_stations_from_api: The PubliBike/Velospot API currently returned no station list.
error.no_stations_for_city: No stations were found for this city.
error.address_or_coordinates_required: Please enter an address or latitude/longitude.
error.address_not_found: The address could not be found. Please enter it more precisely or use coordinates.

abort.already_configured: This PubliBike location is already configured. For another location, use another name/address or station.

init.title: PubliBike options
init.description: Change update interval and minimum e-bike range. The integration will reload afterwards.

data.min_ebike_battery: Minimum e-bike range for search in km
